steps.title: Identify the contextual signal
steps.content: The mihrab is described as foundational to traditional mosque architecture — a feature so essential that even mosques mixing styles still include it. The blank should describe a defining, prototypical feature.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Quintessential means representing the most perfect or typical example — exactly what a foundational, defining feature is.

Imposing (impressive in size), embellished (decorated), and unprecedented (without precedent — the opposite) all miss the meaning.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
